title: DDS Boston — Overtime & 18-Case Intake Weeks
description: Structured, PII-scrubbed compilation of DDS Boston overtime authorizations and elevated-intake (18-case) weeks derived from internal scheduling records. Documents overtime weeks (8 hours each) from May 2025 through May 2026, weeks in which the Boston office ran an 18-case intake cap, and a derived overlap list of weeks where both conditions were active. Personal identifiers removed; the tabulated/derived structure indicates an aggregated record rather than a verbatim primary document.

columns.name: week
columns.description: Week-start date (MM/DD/YYYY) for the documented overtime or intake event.

columns.name: overtime_hours
columns.description: Authorized overtime hours for that week (uniformly 8 across documented overtime weeks).

columns.name: cases_per_week
columns.description: Intake case cap in effect (18 for elevated-cap weeks; 12 or 15 for other listed intake weeks).

source.publisher: SEIU Local 509 / DDS Boston chapter (compiled from internal scheduling records)

notes: No external public URL in the source file; the repo tree URL is a locator. Original records are internal DDS scheduling/guideline documents with personal identifiers removed. row_count counts all data rows across the document's tables.
